title: Netwealth Superannuation Services Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: APRA accepted a court enforceable undertaking from Netwealth Superannuation Services Pty Ltd (trustee of a superannuation platform with around 115,000 member accounts and over $40 billion in funds under management) after a thematic review found material weaknesses in its investment governance framework, including deficiencies in onboarding due diligence and monitoring of investment options and management of outsourced investment services and related conflicts of interest. In parallel, ASIC commenced separate Corporations Act proceedings against Netwealth and accepted its own court-enforceable undertaking relating to First Guardian investor compensation.
scope: Subject of an APRA court enforceable undertaking following a thematic review identifying material weaknesses in investment governance; Findings included deficiencies in due diligence, monitoring of investment options, and management of related-party conflicts of interest; Also subject of separate, parallel ASIC Corporations Act proceedings and a court-enforceable undertaking concerning First Guardian investor compensation
